feat.name: Friend of the Family
feat.text: You come from a long line of imperial kobolds—if you meet a stranger who has some political standing in Tian Xia, they might know someone from your family line. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks to Make an Impression or Request when speaking to politicians or other officials.

traits.name: Kobold
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the kobold ancestry, reptilian humanoids who are usually Small and typically have darkvision. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by kobolds.
